Thanks for the PR! A few things to make review faster:

1. Title follows Conventional Commits, e.g. `feat(codegen): emit AbortSignal`.
2. Link to the issue this closes, if any.
3. If you changed public API, the docs change is in the same PR.
4. CI is green (or you've explained why it isn't).
-->
